Validation Rules: Values: ts_concat (concat demuxer, lossless, requires same codec), concat_protocol (concat demuxer, lossless, requires same codec), filter_complex (re-encode, supports different codecs). Default: MergePage=concat_protocol, ConfigPage auto-switches to filter_complex when intro/outro set. NOTE: concat: URL protocol is NOT used for MP4 compatibility - both concat_protocol and ts_concat use concat demuxer (-f concat -safe 0) with runtime temp list file.
Format: 'WxH'. UI uses two separate number inputs. Only used when merge_mode=filter_complex. Default 1920x1080. FFmpeg uses ':' internally

Description: Target frame rate for re-encode mode
Validation Rules: e.g. 30, 60. Only used when merge_mode=filter_complex. Default 30. Set to 0 for original framerate
Embeds TranscodeConfig (video_codec, audio_codec, quality, etc.). Only used when merge_mode=filter_complex

Description: Ordered list of video file paths to merge
Validation Rules: Minimum 2 files (unless intro/outro is set). Order determines concatenation sequence. User can drag to reorder. Located on MergePage (local mergeConfig). Duplicate files allowed.

Field Name: <!-- v2.1.0-CHANGE: Phase 3.5.2 片头片尾移至 Config 页面; Phase 3.5.2-fixes 全局生效 -->

Description: Intro video path for global batch prepend
Validation Rules: Path to intro video file. When set, ALL queue tasks get this intro prepended via global configRef. Forces merge_mode=filter_complex. No content file_list needed (independent). Managed in Config page (Merge tab) with SplitDropZone + click selection.

Description: Outro video path for global batch append
Validation Rules: Path to outro video file. When set, ALL queue tasks get this outro appended via global configRef. Forces merge_mode=filter_complex. Managed in Config page (Merge tab) with SplitDropZone + click selection.
